# Atlas Home Pro
> Premium multi-trade home services company serving West Los Angeles and surrounding areas.

## About
Atlas Home Pro is a licensed, insured home services company based in Los Angeles, CA. We provide expert residential services across multiple trades with transparent pricing and guaranteed workmanship.

## Services
- **Plumbing**: Drain cleaning, water heater replacement, slab leak detection, repiping, sewer line repair, emergency plumbing, fixture installation, leak detection
- **HVAC**: AC installation & repair, heating systems, duct cleaning, thermostat installation, tune-ups, heat pump systems
- **Electrical**: Electrical upgrades, EV charger installation, panel upgrades, smart home wiring, whole-home generators, solar-ready wiring
- **Roofing**: Roof repair & replacement, emergency leak repair, tile and composition roofing, flat roofing, gutters & drainage
- **Painting**: Interior & exterior painting, cabinet refinishing, color consultation, drywall repair, stucco repair
- **Restoration**: Water damage restoration, mold remediation, smoke & fire damage, insurance claim assistance
- **Pest Control**: General pest control, ant & rodent exclusion, bed bug treatment, quarterly maintenance programs

## Service Areas
West Los Angeles, Beverly Hills, Santa Monica, Brentwood, Pacific Palisades, Bel Air, West Hollywood, Century City, Westwood, Hancock Park, Fairfax District, Pasadena, Burbank, Glendale

## Contact
- **Phone**: 213-275-2210
- **Email**: hello@atlashomepro.com
- **Address**: 145 S Fairfax Suite 200, Los Angeles CA 90036
- **Website**: https://atlashomepro.com
- **Book Online**: https://atlashomepro.com/contact/

## Pricing Philosophy
Atlas Home Pro follows a transparent, Costco-style pricing model — premium quality at honest, competitive prices. No hidden fees. Upfront estimates before any work begins.

## Free Resources
Atlas Home Pro publishes free educational guides for LA homeowners at https://atlashomepro.com/learn/
Topics include HVAC maintenance, plumbing troubleshooting, roofing guidance, pre-sale prep, and neighborhood-specific maintenance tips for Los Angeles properties.

## Licensing & Insurance
Fully licensed under California CSLB. All technicians background-checked and insured.
